overall.description: A first-person driving sequence through a futuristic industrial district in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring massive cooling towers, storage tanks, overhead piping, and commercial billboards. The camera moves smoothly along a graffiti-covered road under a clear blue sky with steam vents visible throughout the environment.

tall cylindrical tower with multiple circular cooling structures stacked vertically
building covered with large commercial advertisements and digital displays

segments.scene_description: The video opens at an industrial intersection dominated by a massive cooling tower with circular vents. The camera drives forward, passing a large ventilation building on the left and turning onto a main road. A distant car is visible ahead as the scene transitions from the open intersection into the industrial corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial roadway with storage tanks and steam vents

events.description: passing large steam vent emitting white smoke on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing down the industrial road, passing large cylindrical storage tanks and active steam vents

tall palm trees lining the left side of the industrial road
industrial vent emitting large plumes of white steam
large industrial pipes running horizontally across the road overhead

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a straight industrial road flanked by large cylindrical storage tanks on the left and industrial office buildings on the right. Palm trees line the left side while steam vents actively emit white smoke. The road surface features colorful graffiti markings as the camera passes under overhead piping.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with overhead pipelines and metal scaffolding

events.description: passing under large overhead industrial pipe structure casting shadows on the road
emerging from enclosed industrial corridor into wider approach with visible commercial billboards

agents.ego_description: driving through a narrow industrial corridor with dense overhead piping and metal scaffolding, approaching commercial billboards in the distance

entered.detail: yellow industrial scaffolding structures supporting pipes and equipment
tall metal electrical towers with multiple power lines
massive commercial billboards visible in the distance at the end of the road
large vertical billboard advertising All Foods with a cartoon mascot

segments.scene_description: The corridor narrows with dense industrial scaffolding and overhead piping creating a semi-enclosed feeling. The camera passes under large pipe bridges while electrical transmission towers appear on the left. In the distance, large commercial billboards including an All Foods advertisement become visible, marking the transition toward a more commercial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial approach with large commercial billboards and power infrastructure

events.description: slight right curve in the road as approaching the All Foods billboard structure

agents.ego_description: approaching large commercial billboards and electrical transmission towers, continuing through the industrial district with slight steering adjustments

entered.detail: overhead directional road sign spanning the width of the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the large commercial billboards that dominate the skyline. The All Foods billboard grows larger on the right while electrical transmission towers line the left side of the road. The camera continues driving forward through the graffiti-covered industrial road, passing under overhead signs as the industrial structures begin to transition to commercial advertising spaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a futuristic industrial district that gradually shifts from a heavy utility zone into a commercial corridor. It begins at an open intersection dominated by a massive cooling tower, moving past a ventilation building before turning onto a main road. As the camera advances, the environment transitions into a straight industrial stretch flanked by cylindrical storage tanks and palm trees, where white smoke from steam vents rises above graffiti-covered pavement. The scene then narrows as the camera passes under dense overhead piping and pipe bridges, with electrical transmission towers appearing on the left. Finally, the industrial structures give way to a more commercial atmosphere as the camera drives toward towering billboards, including a prominent All Foods advertisement that grows to dominate the skyline.
